Item Name: Organic Way Dried Shatavari Cut & Sifted (Asparagus racemosus) - Organic & Kosher Certified | Raw, Vegan, Non GMO & Gluten Free | USDA Certified | Origin - India (1/2LBS / 8Oz) Bullet Point 1: Authentic Ayurvedic Tradition: Our Shatavari Herbal Supplement is a tribute to the time-honored practices of Ayurveda, where Shatavari has been cherished for centuries for its profound benefits. Bullet Point 2: Hand-Selected and Processed: Each piece of Shatavari is carefully hand-selected, ensuring that you receive only the finest quality cuts. Our gentle processing methods preserve the natural properties and potency of the herb. Bullet Point 3: Rejuvenating and Nourishing: Embrace the rejuvenating power of Shatavari as it aids in revitalizing the body and promoting a natural sense of vitality and energy. Bullet Point 4: Versatile Usage: Our Shatavari Cut can be used in various ways – as a herbal infusion, in culinary creations, or blended with other herbs for holistic wellness. Bullet Point 5: Ethical and Eco-Friendly: We are committed to sustainability and ethical practices. By choosing our organic Shatavari cut, you support responsible farming and the preservation of traditional herbal knowledge. Product Description:

Shatavari is also known as Asparagus racemosus. It is also known as an adaptogenic herb, which is said to help your body cope with physical and emotional stress. As it is a general health tonic to improve vitality, making it an important herb in ayurvedic medicine. You can rely on our products for authenticity and potency. Organic Way imports quality organically grown products from different countries and processes them in the USA for the US market. All our products are USDA and Kosher approved and perfectly safe for use.

Our cut and sifted shatavari means that the herb is not sold in whole form, but rather "cut" into smaller pieces and then "sifted" to remove the small pieces and dust that result from the cutting process.

Value: 16.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic herb positioned for health-conscious consumers with strong Ayurvedic and wellness appeal. The USDA Organic and Kosher certifications, along with ethical sourcing and hand-processed quality, justify a higher price point. Packaging emphasizes authenticity and purity, targeting adult consumers interested in holistic wellness and adaptogenic herbs. The 8 oz (226.8 g) pouch size offers a balanced quantity for regular use without bulk, catering to niche but dedicated health markets.
